creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Ivan,

Ivan Klymenko, 02.10.10, 20:21h CEST:

> to correct this problem you need:
> replace string "x264_encoder_open" to "x264_encoder_open_98" in
> source/configuration files
> OR
> replace multimedia/avidemux2/file/patch-ConfigureChecks.cmake - my file
> attach
> and add file patch-configure.in.in to multimedia/avidemux2/file/ -
> my file attach

that makes it find x264 during 'make configure', but the build then fails.
Does 'make' finish successfully for you with that?

Regards,
Stefan
